raw_responses.BFI-10_1: Juan describes himself as someone who is actively involved in community work, activism, and public service. These traits align more with the higher end of the scale, indicating he is not particularly reserved.

raw_responses.BFI-10_3: Juan is described as a dedicated environmental program coordinator who is actively involved in community work, has taken on leadership roles in projects, and is committed to his career and activism. raw_responses.BFI-10_4: Juan has mentioned feeling both excitement and exhaustion over the past year, and has acknowledged struggling with anxiety and stress, especially due to the demands of his job and activism.
